seo.meta_title: Best Supabase Auth Alternatives for Next.js Developers (2026)
seo.meta_description: Looking for alternatives to Supabase Auth? Compare the top Next.js auth tools — Clerk, Kinde, Better Auth — and find the right fit for your project.
seo.og_title: Best Alternatives to Supabase Auth for Next.js
seo.og_description: Top Supabase Auth alternatives ranked by Next.js integration score, pricing, and developer experience.

hero.headline: Best Supabase Auth Alternatives for Next.js (2026)
hero.subheadline: Supabase Auth not quite right? Here are the top alternatives, ranked by how well they integrate with Next.js App Router.

intro_paragraphs: Supabase Auth is a solid choice for Next.js authentication — supabase auth is a built-in authentication service within the supabase platform. But depending on your budget, team size, or feature requirements, one of these alternatives might be a better fit.

faq.question: Why would I choose something over Supabase Auth?
faq.answer: While Supabase Auth scores 7/10 for Next.js integration, other tools may offer better pricing at scale (Free – $75/mo with Yes, 50,000 MAU included in Free tier), different learning curves, or features that Supabase Auth lacks such as tightly coupled to the supabase postgresql ecosystem, less focused on auth-only use cases - it's part of a larger platform.
